value: Native mobile app or PWA work — this is responsive-web polish only
Visual redesign/restyling beyond fixing the named papercuts (sorting, plan_id prefill, mobile breakage)
Mobile layouts must work primarily on iPhone 17 viewport widths (~393px logical) but degrade gracefully across all common small-phone widths (down to ~360px)

data.value: Eliminate a batch of warren UI papercuts \u2014 inconsistent table sorting, manual plan_id entry on plan runs, and poor mobile readiness \u2014 so tables and run-launch flows behave consistently and every page works well on phones.

value: The mobile-readiness work must be standardized (consistent patterns/breakpoints across pages) but may be executed page-by-page or in chunks as needed rather than as one monolithic change
The final seed of this Plot must be a patch version bump executed via the .claude/commands/release.md flow (bump package.json + src/index.ts in sync, update CHANGELOG.md, commit)
